title: Biology 101 — Complete Notes
description: Comprehensive notes covering cells, photosynthesis, respiration, genetics, and ecosystems. Great for high school and first-year university students.

title: Calculus Quick Reference Cheat Sheet
description: All key formulas for limits, derivatives, and integrals on two pages. Print-friendly.

title: World War II — Complete Timeline
description: A detailed visual timeline from 1939 to 1945 covering all major events, battles, and turning points across Europe and the Pacific.

title: Python for Absolute Beginners
description: A 3-hour video course covering variables, loops, functions, and file I/O. No prior programming experience needed.

title: English Grammar Handbook
description: Covers tenses, punctuation, sentence structure, and common mistakes. Suitable for ESL learners and native speakers alike.

title: Algebra Fundamentals — Lecture Slides
description: Slide deck covering linear equations, inequalities, polynomials, and factoring with worked examples.
